name: KAGEM Emerald Mine Expansion Phase 3
description: Expansion of KAGEM emerald mining operations to increase annual production from 30 million to 45 million carats.

name: Kafue Gorge Lower Hydropower Project
description: 750MW hydropower station on the Kafue River. Financed by Chinese development banks.

name: ZAMTEL 4G LTE Network Rollout
description: Deployment of 4G LTE network across all 10 provincial capitals and major towns.

name: Zambia Railways Track Rehabilitation Programme
description: Rehabilitation of 800 km of priority track sections on the main line of rail from Livingstone to Ndola.

name: Zambeef Mpongwe Farm Irrigation Expansion
description: Expansion of irrigation infrastructure at Mpongwe Farm to increase irrigated area from 5,000 to 12,000 hectares.

name: Indeni Refinery Modernisation Project
description: Modernisation of Indeni refinery to increase throughput capacity and improve product quality to Euro 4 standards.
